revisionDesc.change: Automatically generated by Qwen/Qwen3.59B from image https://tile.loc.gov/image-services/iiifservice:mss:mal:435:4356560:001/full/pct:12.5/9/default.jpg

change.span: To the body, add pb facs={image_path}/>

div.head: Executive Mansion,
div.p: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth, upon this continent, anew nation, conceive in liberty, and dedicated to this proposition that "allmen are created equal"

Now we are engaged inagreat civil war, testy whether that nation, or any nation so conceive and so dedicated, can long endure. Mearemet on agreat battle fieldofthatwar. Wehave cometo dedicateaportionofit,asafinalresting placefor thoswho chine here, thatthenation oughtlive. This wenot,inall propiety,to. But, ina largersence, we cannot dedicate_we can notconsecratewe cannothallow,this grouns_the bravemen, livinganddead, whostrugle her, have hallowdit, far above our poorpowerto add ordetact. Theworld will littlenote,norlongremerwhatwepayhere;whilitcannverforgetwhattheydonethere. Itisratherforus,the living,tostandhere,

person.name: Founding Fathers
person.note: "Our fathers" referring to signatories of Declaration of Independence.
